_comment: LVGL included in the LVGL plug-in for VSCode uses LVGL 9.4.0.
The version we have included in this repository as a git submodule
is more recent and hence these two would not be binary compatible.
The LV_USE_DEMO_MUSIC macro defined above in this JSON is overwritten
in the plug-in with their lv_conf.h to the default value of 0.
Hence, we have to manually include all source files of the desired demo
here to bypass #ifndef guards of the LVGL version included in the plug-in.
